restart_reason: PreCompact hook requested a context capsule draft.

commands_run.command: grep -n "function validBaselineResult\|function sampleRun\|function createTreatmentDryRun\|writeDatasetCopy" -n tests/effectiveness/m12-harness.test.ts && sed -n '620,980p' tests/effectiveness/m12-harness.test.ts
